commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
House. Literally, "I am guilty "(Haydock)
"Good people acknowledge a fault, where there is none. "(St. Gregory)
David was aware of the malicious temper of Doeg, but he could not prevent its evil effects, as he had applied to the high priest without perceiving that he was there. (Haydock)
He received Abiathar at Ceila, which he had protected against the Philistines, chap. xxiii.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
